name: fclt
description: Codex workflows and MCP tools for evidence reconciliation, writeback, evolution, and outcome review.

interface.longDescription: Capture signal from real agent work, reconcile configured evidence, turn repeated findings into reviewed capability changes, and verify whether those changes improved the work that produced them.
defaultPrompt: Use fclt to check this repo's AI capability setup.
Reconcile the configured evidence window and explain its coverage.
Record useful writeback from this work and review any repeated signal.
